response:
Subject: Clarification Regarding Machine Vision Sensor Details

Dear Sir,

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response.

I believe there may be a misunderstanding regarding our current machine vision system, which is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C. The image sensor on this device is the Sony IMX172, not the e2V sensor (I have attached the technical data to this email).

Please refer to the FL3-U3-Technical-Reference PDF file and look at page 18 for the detailed datasheet. For information on Quantum efficiency, please check page 13 of the FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging PDF file.

I will study the files and manuals more carefully and keep you informed.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
